text: Q Loop. Full roll integrated at the top.
Bow Tie. Half roll on both 45 uplines. Exit inverted.
Down Humpty. Half roll on the downline, full roll on the upline.
Split S. Half roll to enter, positive snap on exit.
Hammerhead. Half roll on the upline, half roll on the downline.
Goldfish. Half roll on the 45 upline.
Down Humpty Bump. One and three-quarter turn positive spin on entry. Exit inverted.
Down Sharks Tooth. Three-quarter roll on the downline, half roll on the upline. Exit inverted.
Down Fig N. Half roll on the 45 upline.
